seedanceSegments.title: Glossy red sauce hook
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first sauce smear, then chili-spice roux, stock whisk, simmer, and spoon-coating payoff.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only for overhead tortilla and spoon actions. Use @InductionCloseup only for the saucepan simmer and whisking shots. Use @SaucepanLarge, @Whisk and @Spoon only as object references. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown to preserve visible Licorn hands. Use @RedEnchiladaSauceGlossyFrame only as the finished sauce texture target: glossy brick-red, medium-thick, no tomato chunks. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR sounds synchronized with food actions. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s spoon drags glossy red sauce across a soft flour tortilla; 1.0-2.4s hard cut to saucepan lightly bubbling on induction; 2.4-3.8s chili powder and spices bloom in roux as whisk pulls dark paste; 3.8-5.6s stock streams in while whisk smooths sauce; 5.6-7.0s finished sauce coats the back of a spoon in one thick glossy pull. Global negatives: no flame, no text, no captions, no music, no voice, no tomato chunks, no floating spoon, no extra hands, no sauce splashing outside the pan.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening segment. The sauce on the tortilla is immediately re-anchored to the homemade sauce process.

seedanceSegments.title: Chicken, chiles, and beans sizzle
seedanceSegments.description: Onion sizzle, diced chicken, green chiles, black beans, and a steaming filling lift.

Use @cutting_board and @chef_knife only as object references for diced chicken preparation, not as extra actions. Use @tongs only as a pan-handling utensil reference if needed. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown to preserve visible Licorn hands. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, close macro food action, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only synchronized saute, sizzle, scrape and steam sounds. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.3s diced onion hits shimmering oil; 1.3-2.7s small chicken cubes slide from cutting board into pan; 2.7-4.3s hard cut to opaque cooked chicken as green chiles scatter over it; 4.3-6.0s black beans fold through with one turning motion; 6.0-8.0s spoon lifts steaming chunky filling with chicken, beans, onion and green chile flecks. Global negatives: no raw chicken after 2.7s, no flame, no text, no music, no voice, no olives, no floating tools, no second pair of hands.

seedanceSegments.title: Neat enchilada rows
seedanceSegments.description: Rolling and placing enchiladas seam-side down, then completing the row geometry.

Use @EnchiladaRowUnbakedFrame only as the target topology: eight rolled flour tortillas in parallel rows, rounded ridges, seam-side down, not flat casserole layers. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Global negatives: no text, no music, no voice, no flat lasagna slab, no torn tortillas, no multiple hands crossing, no extra shots.
